name: Maryam Al-Harbi
whatsapp_message: السلام عليكم مريم 👋 نحن في أكاديمية بون نود أن نتحقق عليك وندعمك في مسيرتك التعليمية قبل الاختبار القادم خلال 6 أيام 📚 درجتك الحالية 67 جيدة، لكننا نريد مساعدتك للوصول لأفضل أداء - هل تحتاجين إلى أي شرح أو استفسار؟
action: Contact Maryam via WhatsApp today to introduce yourself as her facilitator, assess her understanding of recent material, and schedule a check-in session before the quiz in 6 days.
reasoning: Maryam has never been contacted by a facilitator despite having a high-risk score of 60/100 and quiz performance just above the passing threshold. Early intervention before her next quiz is critical to prevent further decline and improve her academic outcomes.
